description: 10 evaluation scenarios for benchmarking model performance

scenarios.description: Crowded office with many APs on overlapping channels
Simple home setup with router + 2 neighbors
Coffee shop with multiple phone hotspots
Far from all APs, weak signals throughout
Mix of 2.4GHz and 5GHz with band steering
User moving between rooms, distances changing
Evening peak hours with max congestion
Outdoor with long-range APs and cellular
Only one usable AP, testing degradation handling
